# addEdgeAndSave

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for addEdgeAndSave

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useAddEdgeAndSaveMutation(); mutate({ input: '<AddEdgeAndSaveInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useAddEdgeAndSaveMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useAddEdgeAndSaveMutation();
mutate({ input: '<AddEdgeAndSaveInput>' });
```
